title: stelis ejuncida
intro: Stelis ejuncida, also known as the Yellow Lip Orchid, is a type of orchid plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is known for its unique yellow flowers with a distinctive lip shape. The medicinal properties of Stelis ejuncida include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, promoting wound healing, and boosting the immune system.
